woocommerce_order_tracking_status.line:
apply_filters(
            'woocommerce_order_tracking_status',
            sprintf(
                /* translators: 1: order number 2: order date 3: order status */
                __( 'Order #%1$s was placed on %2$s and is currently %3$s.', 'woocommerce' )

woocommerce_lost_password_confirmation_m.line: apply_filters('woocommerce_lost_password_confirmation_message', esc_html__('A password reset email has been sent to the email address on file for your account, but may take several minutes to show up in your inbox. woocommerce_pagination_args.line:
apply_filters(
            'woocommerce_pagination_args',
            array( // WPCS: XSS ok.
                'base'      => $base,
                'format'    => $format,
                'add_args'  => false,
                'current'   => max( 1, $current )
woocommerce_pagination_args.default:
array( // WPCS: XSS ok.
                'base'      => $base,
                'format'    => $format,
                'add_args'  => false,
                'current'   => max( 1, $current

woocommerce_loop_add_to_cart_link.default: // WPCS: XSS ok. sprintf( '%s', esc_url( $product->add_to_cart_url(

tgmpa_admin_menu_args.line:
apply_filters(
                'tgmpa_admin_menu_args',
                [
                    'parent_slug' => $this->parent_slug,                     // Parent Menu slug.
                    'page_title'  => $this->strings['page_title'],           // Page title.
                    'menu_title'  => $this->strings['menu_title'],           // Menu title.
                    'capability'  => $this->capability,                      // Capability.
                    'menu_slug'   => $this->menu,                            // Menu slug.
                    'function'    => [$this, 'install_plugins_page'], // Callback.
                ]
            )
tgmpa_admin_menu_args.default:
[
                    'parent_slug' => $this->parent_slug,                     // Parent Menu slug.
                    'page_title'  => $this->strings['page_title'],           // Page title.
                    'menu_title'  => $this->strings['menu_title'],           // Menu title.
                    'capability'  => $this->capability,                      // Capability.
                    'menu_slug'   => $this->menu,                            // Menu slug.
                    'function'    => [$this, 'install_plugins_page'], // Callback.
                ]
